name: NMU Books Marketplace
shortDescription: Buy, sell, and discover textbooks in a simple student marketplace powered by WhatsApp.
description:
NMU Books Marketplace is a peer-to-peer textbook exchange platform designed to help students easily buy, sell, and find academic books in one centralized system.

Instead of relying on scattered group chats or social media posts, students can browse available textbooks, request books they need, and connect directly with sellers through WhatsApp.

The platform is built with a modern, fast, and lightweight design as part of the DTECH ecosystem, focusing on simplicity, accessibility, and student convenience.
keyFeatures: Search by title, author, or seller
Direct contact between buyers and sellers
Responsive grid layout for all devices
Offline caching for previously viewed books
Fast loading with optimized data requests
Separate sections for selling and requests
